title: Bodycam, dashcam, 911 audio: full incident package
description: Includes BWC footage, in-car video, the dispatch call, and a courtroom video clip from the sentencing hearing.
transcript: The officer's interview footage and a separate confession video were also released. Surveillance footage from a nearby store shows the same encounter, and the OIS video was filed by the agency. The investigator referenced 911 audio during questioning.
